Special Forces: Most Daring Missions
programs.desc: In 1980, terrorists took twenty people hostage at the Iranian embassy in London.The rescue mission performed by special forces was broadcast live on British television.

programs.title: Israel and the Palestinians: The Road to 7th October
programs.desc: Recognized documentarian, Emmy and BAFTA winner, Norma Percy, deals with the Israeli-Palestinian conflict and asks how it is possible that the conflict escalated during the intense search for peace in the Middle East.The filmmakers begin with Israel's withdrawal from the Gaza Strip in September 2005.The program reveals the behind-the-scenes of decades-long diplomatic disputes until October 7, 2023.Percy's interviewees, including:Hillary Clinton, Tony Blair and leading Israeli and Palestinian politicians discuss the causes of the dispute and breakthrough events in relations between the parties.
